- **Otherwise looks like a normal photo:** Lighting, shadows on the suit, depth of field, and the background banner/podium all appear consistent and coherent. No obvious AI-generation artifacts (warped text, impossible geometry, mismatched reflections) are visible.

- **No counterfactual elements apparent from the image alone:** The scene (podium, institutional seal, staged backdrop) looks plausible; the only notable manipulation is the face obfuscation.
